reportsPage.title: Reports
reportsPage.subtitle: Custom widget layout — team and individual results.
reportsPage.emptyMessage: Add your first widget — track exactly what you need.

widgetDescriptions.deals_won: Count and value of deals won.
widgetDescriptions.win_rate: Share of closed deals that were won.
widgetDescriptions.sales_cycle_length: Average time to close a deal.
widgetDescriptions.lead_to_deal_conversion: Share of new companies that converted to a deal.
widgetDescriptions.lost_reasons_breakdown: Breakdown of lost deals by reason.
widgetDescriptions.stale_deals: Deals with no movement for a while.
